description: Category-based spending limits for the current month. Users set budget amounts per category and the app calculates actual spending against each budget. Progress bars show utilization and over-budget categories are visually highlighted.

subDeliverables.title: Budget CRUD
subDeliverables.description: Create, read, update, and delete budgets with category selection and amount. Category filter prevents duplicate budgets for the same category.
acceptanceCriteria: Create budget by selecting category and entering amount

subDeliverables.title: Progress bar with spending vs budget
subDeliverables.description: Visual progress bar for each budget showing current month's actual spending as a proportion of the budget amount.
acceptanceCriteria: Progress bar fills proportionally to spending/budget ratio
Actual spend and budget amounts displayed as text

subDeliverables.title: Over-budget visual alerts
subDeliverables.description: When spending exceeds the budget amount, the progress bar changes to destructive color and an alert indicator is shown.
acceptanceCriteria: Progress bar turns red/destructive when over 100%
Visual alert indicator on over-budget categories
Clear distinction between under and over budget

subDeliverables.title: Current month scope
subDeliverables.description: Budget calculations scoped to the current calendar month, comparing expenses from the 1st to the last day of the month against budget amounts.
acceptanceCriteria: Expenses filtered to current calendar month only
Date range: 1st to last day of current month
